summary: Visual/theme regression test for Fork-Fate PWA. Verified default + fall/winter/steam/cyber themes render with no JS/pageerrors, guided-skip works, home content (zip, radius, mode tabs Food/Drinks/Bars/Desserts/Shops/Fuel, Banh Mi chip) visible, cyber header neon logo and cyber-neon skyline present, shuffle deck opens with card-back showing cyber-spinner-suv, result card lands successfully, and Shops/Fuel curated fallback deals produce a result card.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx is very large (>2200 lines) with many inline decoration blocks (SeasonScene, AmbianceScene, CardBack variants, ShufflingDeck). Consider extracting theme scenes and CardBack into separate modules for maintainability.
Multiple duplicate card-back blocks (6 occurrences at lines 1690-1737) - could be refactored to a single component parameterized by theme.
Farmers Market chip is hidden behind '+ 54 more' expand in Shops cuisine - present in data but not visible without expanding. Verify UX intent (may be by design).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deal button testid is 'spin-roulette-button' (not 'shuffle-button'). Radius uses 'radius-slider' (not 'radius-input'). Guided flow may not always appear; guided-skip only present when guided modal is open. Themes set via localStorage 'ff_theme' - must reload after setting. Only console noise seen was a single 'Failed to load resource: net::ERR_FAILED' (unrelated to theme code, likely a beacon/analytics call).
verified_flows: Default theme home load: no page errors
Theme=steam: steam-jet and steam-floor render, no errors
Theme=cyber: cyber-neon skyline + header /cyber-neon-logo.png present, no errors
Cyber shuffle: shuffling-deck opens, 5 card-backs shown, /cyber-spinner-suv.png present, result-photo-link renders
Shops mode deal: result-photo-link + favorite-toggle rendered (curated fallback)
Fuel mode deal: result-photo-link rendered (curated fallback)
Guided-skip testid works to dismiss overlay
Banh Mi chip visible under Food cuisine
